---
title: "Tutorials"
toc: true
---

This section provides practical examples demonstrating how CORE can be used within empirical research workflows.

The objective of these tutorials is not only to explain how the software operates, but also to illustrate the methodological principles underlying transparent and reproducible entity resolution.

---

# Tutorial 1 — Running the CORE Demonstrator

The easiest way to explore CORE is through the interactive Shiny demonstrator.

Start the application from the project root directory:

```r
options(shiny.launch.browser = TRUE)

shiny::runApp(
  appDir = "app",
  host = "127.0.0.1",
  port = 3838,
  launch.browser = TRUE
)
